title: WII – Project Scientist, Project Associate and More – 20 Posts

basic_details.job_title: WII Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Project Scientist, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) Recruitment 2026 for 20 posts of Project Positions. Candidates with M.Tech / B.Tech, PhD, MVSc / BVSc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WII official website wii.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Natural Sciences, Master’s in Natural Sciences / Wildlife Sciences / Ecology / Forestry, M.Tech / B.Tech in CS/IT/RS-GIS/AI/Electronics, MVSc / BVSc, NET/GATE qualified (preferred for higher pay)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Wildlife Institute of India Project Manager (Training & Capacity)
